Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

10 most important BG, SB and CC verses

Philosophy · asked by user [] · 2007-09-11 · 8 answers
I would like to know the 10 most important Bhagavad Gita, Srimad Bhagavatam and Caitanya Caritamrta verses
user [2] · 2007-09-11
SB 1.1.2: Completely rejecting all religious activities which are materially motivated, this Bhuc0u257 gavata Puru257 nu803 a propounds the highest truth, which is understandable by those devotees who are fully pure in heart. The highest truth is reality distinguished from illusion for the welfare of all. Such truth uproots the threefold miseries. This beautiful Bhu257 gavatam, compiled by the great sage Vyu257 sadeva [in his maturity], is sufficient in itself for God realization. What is the need of any other scripture? As soon as one attentively and submissively hears the message of Bhu257 gavatam, by this culture of knowledge the Supreme Lord is established within his heart.
user [33] · 2007-09-11
Wouldnt the memorization verses from the Bhakti (Bhakti-sastri etc.) courses be the most important?
user [19] · 2007-09-12
I need 10 for BG, 10 for SB and 10 for CC or others.

In bhakti sastri there are more than 10 but i want the most essential ones to give it to a friend.
user [38] · 2007-09-12
30 key BG slokas: http://www.veda.harekrsna.cz/encyclopedia/sastras-studies1.htm#5
user [154] · 2007-09-12
Its hard. Why ten. Is it for purposes of study or do you want 10 most used by Srila Prabhupada?
user [19] · 2007-09-12
because i dont want to give my friend too many. Just 10 to begin with and then more.
user [33] · 2007-09-12
Just an idea: Go to this website
http://www.prabhupadavani.org/
and pick out some of the verses that Srila Prabhupada most often gave lectures/classes on.

Also, there is a book called "Prabhupada slokas" which gives the verses most often mention and spoke on by Srila Prabhupada.
user [154] · 2007-09-13
Because he need the basics
you can give him:

Gita
BG 10.8-11 - catursloki
BG 18.65-66 - conclusion
plus most common slokas by SP from the second chapter

Srimad Bhagavatam:
1.1.1
1.1.2
atmarama verse
catursloki
plus most common slokas by SP from Kunti prayers and Prahladas instructions.

First ten verses of CC?
